'''yawudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocathiacin|nocathiacin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocathiacin|nocathiacin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yawudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæwidith|yæwidith]] || [[word:yæwidij|yæwidij]] || [[word:yæwidish|yæwidish]] || [[word:yæwidi|yæwidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawuwuduth|yawuwuduth]] || [[word:yawuwuduj|yawuwuduj]] || [[word:yawuwudush|yawuwudush]] || [[word:yawuwudu|yawuwudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yawuduth|yawuduth]] || [[word:yawuduj|yawuduj]] || [[word:yawudush|yawudush]] || [[word:yawudu|yawudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawufduth|yawufduth]] || [[word:yawufduj|yawufduj]] || [[word:yawufdush|yawufdush]] || [[word:yawufduf|yawufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yawuduthu|yawuduthu]] || [[word:yawuduju|yawuduju]] || [[word:yawudushu|yawudushu]] || [[word:yawuduku|yawuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yawuduth|yawuduth]] || [[word:yawuduj|yawuduj]] || [[word:yawudush|yawudush]] || [[word:yawudu|yawudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yawuduthul|yawuduthul]] || [[word:yawudujul|yawudujul]] || [[word:yawudushul|yawudushul]] || [[word:yawudukul|yawudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yawuduthuthu|yawuduthuthu]] || [[word:yawudujuju|yawudujuju]] || [[word:yawudushushu|yawudushushu]] || [[word:yawuduku|yawuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yawuduthun|yawuduthun]] || [[word:yawudujun|yawudujun]] || [[word:yawudushun|yawudushun]] || [[word:yawudukun|yawudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yawuduthuoro|yawuduthuoro]] || [[word:yawudujuoro|yawudujuoro]] || [[word:yawudushuoro|yawudushuoro]] || [[word:yawudukuoro|yawudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
